The simplest way to access Solana yield.

SolStacker organizes multiple Solana yield sources into curated Cores you can compare, allocate to, and manage from one Account.

LST

Balanced Core

Balanced

SOL, stable yield, and RWA exposure combined into one Core.

Access yield through Cores.

Cores package multiple Solana yield sources into clear allocation paths, with Auto Stack for SOL accumulation and Account for position tracking.

Cores

Compare curated Solana yield allocations by APY, risk, liquidity, source mix, and strategy intent.

Auto Stack

Accumulate SOL over time while unfilled capital continues earning yield before execution.

Account

See every position, pending execution, allocation, activity, and earned yield from one connected-wallet view.

Stats

Review TVL, APY history, volume, source mix, and Core composition before allocating.

Model a Core before you allocate.

Set a lump sum, add a monthly commitment, and compare how different Cores project over time at current APY.

From Core to Account.

Choose the allocation that matches your intent, review where yield comes from, then track the position as it performs.

Choose a Core

Start from an allocation style: Simple, SOL, RWA, Markets, Active, or High Yield.

Review the mix

See sources, assets, APY, risk, and liquidity profile before committing capital.

Track in Account

Follow positions, pending executions, allocation, activity, and earned yield from one wallet view.

Your SolStacker position, in one Account.

Connect your wallet to track Cores, Auto Stack, allocation, activity, pending executions, and yield earned over time.

Start with a Core. Stack from there.

Explore curated Solana yield, model a monthly commitment, and allocate when the Core fits your strategy.

SolStacker

SolStacker organizes Solana yield into curated Cores, helping users allocate, accumulate, and track yield from one Account.
